node.title: UBER OA practice qs for 24th Feb test

article.title: UBER OA practice qs for 24th Feb test
article.content:
Hi everyone, I’m also from the '26 batch and preparing for Uber upcming OA.


I’m using this web, which contains recent OA qs of Uber.


If u want to check the OA difficulty level and qs pattern, u can practice from here as well.


https://www.codinzhub.com/company/uber


[Link](https://www.codinzhub.com/company/uber)


![image.png](https://assets.leetcode.com/users/images/3933bf0f-dffd-41cb-9752-881bd8e3a918_1771503763.7496202.png)


![image.png](https://assets.leetcode.com/users/images/61d2b560-54ca-4f7d-a358-ee44cd61857a_1771503738.1044986.png)
